---
title: "Clustering Comparison: New vs IDEAL paper clustering"
subtitle: "Analyzing Differences Between Clustering Approaches"
author: "Clustering Analysis"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 3
    fig_width: 12
    fig_height: 8
    theme: cosmo
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(gridExtra)
library(knitr)

# Set working directory to project root
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = '../../')
```

## Data Loading

```{r load_data, echo=FALSE}
# Load clustering data from both approaches
clustering_standard <- list(
  groups = read.csv('data/results/clustering/groups.csv'),
  chars = read.csv('data/results/clustering/characteristics.csv'),
  centroids = read.csv('data/results/clustering/centroids.csv'),
  kcca_info = read.csv('data/results/clustering/kcca_info.csv')
)

# Check if IDEAL clustering files exist
ideal_dir <- 'data/results/clustering_IDEAL'
if (dir.exists(ideal_dir)) {
  clustering_ideal <- list(
    groups = read.csv('data/results/clustering_IDEAL/groups.csv'),
    chars = read.csv('data/results/clustering_IDEAL/characteristics.csv'),
    centroids = read.csv('data/results/clustering_IDEAL/centroids.csv'),
    kcca_info = read.csv('data/results/clustering_IDEAL/kcca_info.csv')
  )
} else {
  warning(sprintf("Directory not found: %s - IDEAL clustering comparison will be skipped. Please run dataset_clustering_IDEAL.R first.", ideal_dir))
  clustering_ideal <- NULL
}

# Identify datasets that were analyzed but not clustered
standard_missing <- setdiff(clustering_standard$chars$dataset_name, clustering_standard$groups$dataset_name)
ideal_missing <- if (!is.null(clustering_ideal)) setdiff(clustering_ideal$chars$dataset_name, clustering_ideal$groups$dataset_name) else c()

# Find datasets in both clusterings (for fair comparison)
standard_datasets <- clustering_standard$groups$dataset_name
ideal_datasets <- if (!is.null(clustering_ideal)) clustering_ideal$groups$dataset_name else c()
common_datasets <- intersect(standard_datasets, ideal_datasets)
only_standard <- setdiff(standard_datasets, ideal_datasets)
only_ideal <- setdiff(ideal_datasets, standard_datasets)

# Display basic info
cat("=== DATASET COUNTS ===\n\n")
cat("Standard/New Clustering:\n")
cat("  - Total analyzed:", nrow(clustering_standard$chars), "\n")
cat("  - Successfully clustered:", nrow(clustering_standard$groups), "\n")
cat("  - Missing cluster assignments:", length(standard_missing), "\n")
if(length(standard_missing) > 0) {
  cat("    Datasets without cluster assignments:", paste(standard_missing, collapse = ", "), "\n")
}

if (!is.null(clustering_ideal)) {
  cat("\nIDEAL Clustering:\n")
  cat("  - Total analyzed:", nrow(clustering_ideal$chars), "\n")
  cat("  - Successfully clustered:", nrow(clustering_ideal$groups), "\n")
  cat("  - Missing cluster assignments:", length(ideal_missing), "\n")
  if(length(ideal_missing) > 0) {
    cat("    Datasets without cluster assignments:", paste(ideal_missing, collapse = ", "), "\n")
  }
  
  cat("\n=== DATASET OVERLAP COMPARISON ===\n\n")
  cat("Datasets in BOTH clusterings (for comparison):", length(common_datasets), "\n")
  cat("Datasets ONLY in Standard clustering:", length(only_standard), "\n")
  if(length(only_standard) > 0) {
    cat("  -", paste(only_standard, collapse = ", "), "\n")
  }
  cat("Datasets ONLY in IDEAL clustering:", length(only_ideal), "\n")
  if(length(only_ideal) > 0) {
    cat("  -", paste(only_ideal, collapse = ", "), "\n")
  }
} else {
  cat("\nIDEAL Clustering: Data not available\n")
  common_datasets <- c()
}
```

## Clustering Overview

### Standard Clustering Summary

```{r standard_summary, echo=FALSE}
# Summary statistics for standard clustering
cat("K-value:", clustering_standard$kcca_info$K[1], "\n")
cat("Number of clusters:", clustering_standard$kcca_info$num_centers[1], "\n")
cat("Total within-cluster sum of squares:", round(clustering_standard$kcca_info$tot_withinss[1], 4), "\n")
cat("Between-cluster sum of squares:", round(clustering_standard$kcca_info$betweenss[1], 4), "\n")
cat("Cluster sizes:", paste(clustering_standard$kcca_info[1, grepl("size_cluster", names(clustering_standard$kcca_info))], collapse = ", "), "\n")
```

### IDEAL Clustering Summary

```{r ideal_summary, echo=FALSE}
# Summary statistics for ideal clustering
cat("K-value:", clustering_ideal$kcca_info$K[1], "\n")
cat("Number of clusters:", clustering_ideal$kcca_info$num_centers[1], "\n")
cat("Total within-cluster sum of squares:", round(clustering_ideal$kcca_info$tot_withinss[1], 4), "\n")
cat("Between-cluster sum of squares:", round(clustering_ideal$kcca_info$betweenss[1], 4), "\n")
cat("Cluster sizes:", paste(clustering_ideal$kcca_info[1, grepl("size_cluster", names(clustering_ideal$kcca_info))], collapse = ", "), "\n")
```

## Group Assignment Comparison

```{r group_comparison, echo=FALSE}
if (!is.null(clustering_ideal) && length(common_datasets) > 0) {
  # Filter to only common datasets
  standard_common <- clustering_standard$groups %>%
    filter(dataset_name %in% common_datasets) %>%
    as.data.frame()
  
  ideal_common <- clustering_ideal$groups %>%
    filter(dataset_name %in% common_datasets) %>%
    arrange(dataset_name) %>%
    as.data.frame()
  
  standard_common <- standard_common %>% arrange(dataset_name)
  
  # Create comparison dataframe
  comparison_df <- data.frame(
    dataset_name = standard_common$dataset_name,
    standard_hclust_4 = standard_common$hclust_4,
    ideal_hclust_4 = ideal_common$hclust_4,
    standard_hclust_5 = standard_common$hclust_5,
    ideal_hclust_5 = ideal_common$hclust_5,
    standard_kmeans_4 = standard_common$kmeans_4,
    ideal_kmeans_4 = ideal_common$kmeans_4,
    standard_kmeans_5 = standard_common$kmeans_5,
    ideal_kmeans_5 = ideal_common$kmeans_5
  )
  
  # Calculate changes
  comparison_df$hclust_4_changed <- comparison_df$standard_hclust_4 != comparison_df$ideal_hclust_4
  comparison_df$hclust_5_changed <- comparison_df$standard_hclust_5 != comparison_df$ideal_hclust_5
  comparison_df$kmeans_4_changed <- comparison_df$standard_kmeans_4 != comparison_df$ideal_kmeans_4
  comparison_df$kmeans_5_changed <- comparison_df$standard_kmeans_5 != comparison_df$ideal_kmeans_5
  
  # Summary of changes
  summary_changes <- data.frame(
    Algorithm = c("HClust K=4", "HClust K=5", "KMeans K=4", "KMeans K=5"),
    Datasets_Changed = c(
      sum(comparison_df$hclust_4_changed),
      sum(comparison_df$hclust_5_changed),
      sum(comparison_df$kmeans_4_changed),
      sum(comparison_df$kmeans_5_changed)
    ),
    Total_Datasets = nrow(comparison_df),
    Percent_Changed = c(
      round(sum(comparison_df$hclust_4_changed) / nrow(comparison_df) * 100, 2),
      round(sum(comparison_df$hclust_5_changed) / nrow(comparison_df) * 100, 2),
      round(sum(comparison_df$kmeans_4_changed) / nrow(comparison_df) * 100, 2),
      round(sum(comparison_df$kmeans_5_changed) / nrow(comparison_df) * 100, 2)
    )
  )
  
  kable(summary_changes, caption = "Summary of Cluster Assignment Changes (Common Datasets Only)")
} else {
  cat("Cannot perform comparison: No common datasets between Standard and IDEAL clusterings.\n")
}
```

## Datasets with Assignment Changes

### HClust K=4

```{r hclust_4_changes, echo=FALSE}
if (!is.null(clustering_ideal) && length(common_datasets) > 0 && exists("comparison_df")) {
  changes_hclust_4 <- comparison_df[comparison_df$hclust_4_changed, 
                                     c("dataset_name", "standard_hclust_4", "ideal_hclust_4")]
  if(nrow(changes_hclust_4) > 0) {
    names(changes_hclust_4) <- c("Dataset", "Standard Cluster", "IDEAL Cluster")
    kable(changes_hclust_4, caption = "Datasets with HClust K=4 cluster changes")
  } else {
    cat("No changes in HClust K=4 assignments\n")
  }
} else {
  cat("Cannot perform analysis: No common datasets or IDEAL data not available\n")
}
```

### HClust K=5

```{r hclust_5_changes, echo=FALSE}
if (!is.null(clustering_ideal) && length(common_datasets) > 0 && exists("comparison_df")) {
  changes_hclust_5 <- comparison_df[comparison_df$hclust_5_changed, 
                                     c("dataset_name", "standard_hclust_5", "ideal_hclust_5")]
  if(nrow(changes_hclust_5) > 0) {
    names(changes_hclust_5) <- c("Dataset", "Standard Cluster", "IDEAL Cluster")
    kable(changes_hclust_5, caption = "Datasets with HClust K=5 cluster changes")
  } else {
    cat("No changes in HClust K=5 assignments\n")
  }
} else {
  cat("Cannot perform analysis: No common datasets or IDEAL data not available\n")
}
```

### KMeans K=4

```{r kmeans_4_changes, echo=FALSE}
if (!is.null(clustering_ideal) && length(common_datasets) > 0 && exists("comparison_df")) {
  changes_kmeans_4 <- comparison_df[comparison_df$kmeans_4_changed, 
                                     c("dataset_name", "standard_kmeans_4", "ideal_kmeans_4")]
  if(nrow(changes_kmeans_4) > 0) {
    names(changes_kmeans_4) <- c("Dataset", "Standard Cluster", "IDEAL Cluster")
    kable(changes_kmeans_4, caption = "Datasets with KMeans K=4 cluster changes")
  } else {
    cat("No changes in KMeans K=4 assignments\n")
  }
} else {
  cat("Cannot perform analysis: No common datasets or IDEAL data not available\n")
}
```

### KMeans K=5

```{r kmeans_5_changes, echo=FALSE}
if (!is.null(clustering_ideal) && length(common_datasets) > 0 && exists("comparison_df")) {
  changes_kmeans_5 <- comparison_df[comparison_df$kmeans_5_changed, 
                                     c("dataset_name", "standard_kmeans_5", "ideal_kmeans_5")]
  if(nrow(changes_kmeans_5) > 0) {
    names(changes_kmeans_5) <- c("Dataset", "Standard Cluster", "IDEAL Cluster")
    kable(changes_kmeans_5, caption = "Datasets with KMeans K=5 cluster changes")
  } else {
    cat("No changes in KMeans K=5 assignments\n")
  }
} else {
  cat("Cannot perform analysis: No common datasets or IDEAL data not available\n")
}
```

## Visualization: Cluster Space Comparison

```{r cluster_space_viz, echo=FALSE}
if (!is.null(clustering_ideal) && length(common_datasets) > 0) {
  # Filter to common datasets
  standard_common_groups <- clustering_standard$groups %>%
    filter(dataset_name %in% common_datasets) %>%
    arrange(dataset_name)
  
  ideal_common_groups <- clustering_ideal$groups %>%
    filter(dataset_name %in% common_datasets) %>%
    arrange(dataset_name)
  
  # Prepare data for visualization
  viz_data_standard <- standard_common_groups[, c("dataset_name", "coordinate_1", "coordinate_2", "hclust_4")]
  viz_data_standard$approach <- "Standard"
  
  viz_data_ideal <- ideal_common_groups[, c("dataset_name", "coordinate_1", "coordinate_2", "hclust_4")]
  viz_data_ideal$approach <- "IDEAL"
  
  viz_data_combined <- rbind(viz_data_standard, viz_data_ideal)
  
  # Create visualization
  p1 <- ggplot(viz_data_standard, aes(x = coordinate_1, y = coordinate_2, color = factor(hclust_4))) +
    geom_point(size = 3, alpha = 0.7) +
    geom_text(aes(label = dataset_name), vjust = -0.5, size = 2, alpha = 0.6) +
    theme_minimal() +
    labs(title = "Standard Clustering (HClust K=4)",
         x = "Coordinate 1",
         y = "Coordinate 2",
         color = "Cluster") +
    theme(legend.position = "bottom")
  
  p2 <- ggplot(viz_data_ideal, aes(x = coordinate_1, y = coordinate_2, color = factor(hclust_4))) +
    geom_point(size = 3, alpha = 0.7) +
    geom_text(aes(label = dataset_name), vjust = -0.5, size = 2, alpha = 0.6) +
    theme_minimal() +
    labs(title = "IDEAL Clustering (HClust K=4)",
         x = "Coordinate 1",
         y = "Coordinate 2",
         color = "Cluster") +
    theme(legend.position = "bottom")
  
  grid.arrange(p1, p2, ncol = 2)
} else {
  cat("Cannot create visualization: No common datasets between Standard and IDEAL clusterings.\n")
}
```

## Dataset Characteristics Analysis

```{r characteristics_analysis, echo=FALSE}
if (!is.null(clustering_ideal) && length(common_datasets) > 0) {
  # Filter characteristics to common datasets
  chars_common <- clustering_standard$chars %>%
    filter(dataset_name %in% common_datasets)
  
  # Merge characteristics with clustering assignments from both approaches
  chars_analysis <- chars_common %>%
    left_join(
      clustering_standard$groups[, c("dataset_name", "hclust_4", "hclust_5", "kmeans_4", "kmeans_5")],
      by = "dataset_name"
    ) %>%
    rename(standard_hclust_4 = hclust_4,
           standard_hclust_5 = hclust_5,
           standard_kmeans_4 = kmeans_4,
           standard_kmeans_5 = kmeans_5)
  
  # Get IDEAL cluster assignments
  ideal_groups <- clustering_ideal$groups %>%
    filter(dataset_name %in% common_datasets) %>%
    select(dataset_name, hclust_4, hclust_5, kmeans_4, kmeans_5) %>%
    rename(ideal_hclust_4 = hclust_4,
           ideal_hclust_5 = hclust_5,
           ideal_kmeans_4 = kmeans_4,
           ideal_kmeans_5 = kmeans_5)
  
  chars_analysis <- chars_analysis %>%
    left_join(ideal_groups, by = "dataset_name")
  
  # ===== STANDARD CLUSTERING ANALYSIS =====
  cat("\n### Standard Clustering Analysis\n\n")
  
  # HClust K=4
  cat("#### HClust K=4 - Characteristics by Cluster\n\n")
  chars_by_cluster_std_hc4 <- chars_analysis %>%
    group_by(standard_hclust_4) %>%
    summarise(
      Cluster = cur_group()[[1]],
      Count = n(),
      Avg_Instances = round(mean(instances_n, na.rm = TRUE), 1),
      Avg_Numeric_Attrs = round(mean(attributes_num, na.rm = TRUE), 1),
      Avg_Nominal_Attrs = round(mean(attributes_nom, na.rm = TRUE), 1),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    select(Cluster, Count, Avg_Instances, Avg_Numeric_Attrs, Avg_Nominal_Attrs)
  
  print(kable(chars_by_cluster_std_hc4, caption = "Standard Clustering: HClust K=4 Cluster Characteristics"))
  
  # HClust K=5
  cat("\n#### HClust K=5 - Characteristics by Cluster\n\n")
  chars_by_cluster_std_hc5 <- chars_analysis %>%
    group_by(standard_hclust_5) %>%
    summarise(
      Cluster = cur_group()[[1]],
      Count = n(),
      Avg_Instances = round(mean(instances_n, na.rm = TRUE), 1),
      Avg_Numeric_Attrs = round(mean(attributes_num, na.rm = TRUE), 1),
      Avg_Nominal_Attrs = round(mean(attributes_nom, na.rm = TRUE), 1),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    select(Cluster, Count, Avg_Instances, Avg_Numeric_Attrs, Avg_Nominal_Attrs)
  
  print(kable(chars_by_cluster_std_hc5, caption = "Standard Clustering: HClust K=5 Cluster Characteristics"))
  
  cat("\n")
  
  # ===== IDEAL CLUSTERING ANALYSIS =====
  cat("\n### IDEAL Clustering Analysis\n\n")
  
  # HClust K=4
  cat("#### HClust K=4 - Characteristics by Cluster\n\n")
  chars_by_cluster_ideal_hc4 <- chars_analysis %>%
    group_by(ideal_hclust_4) %>%
    summarise(
      Cluster = cur_group()[[1]],
      Count = n(),
      Avg_Instances = round(mean(instances_n, na.rm = TRUE), 1),
      Avg_Numeric_Attrs = round(mean(attributes_num, na.rm = TRUE), 1),
      Avg_Nominal_Attrs = round(mean(attributes_nom, na.rm = TRUE), 1),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    select(Cluster, Count, Avg_Instances, Avg_Numeric_Attrs, Avg_Nominal_Attrs)
  
  print(kable(chars_by_cluster_ideal_hc4, caption = "IDEAL Clustering: HClust K=4 Cluster Characteristics"))
  
  # HClust K=5
  cat("\n#### HClust K=5 - Characteristics by Cluster\n\n")
  chars_by_cluster_ideal_hc5 <- chars_analysis %>%
    group_by(ideal_hclust_5) %>%
    summarise(
      Cluster = cur_group()[[1]],
      Count = n(),
      Avg_Instances = round(mean(instances_n, na.rm = TRUE), 1),
      Avg_Numeric_Attrs = round(mean(attributes_num, na.rm = TRUE), 1),
      Avg_Nominal_Attrs = round(mean(attributes_nom, na.rm = TRUE), 1),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    select(Cluster, Count, Avg_Instances, Avg_Numeric_Attrs, Avg_Nominal_Attrs)
  
  print(kable(chars_by_cluster_ideal_hc5, caption = "IDEAL Clustering: HClust K=5 Cluster Characteristics"))
  
} else {
  cat("Cannot perform characteristics analysis: No common datasets or IDEAL data not available\n")
}
```

## Characteristics Distribution by Cluster

```{r characteristics_boxplots, echo=FALSE}
if (!is.null(clustering_ideal) && length(common_datasets) > 0 && exists("chars_analysis")) {
  # Prepare data for visualization
  plot_data <- chars_analysis %>%
    pivot_longer(
      cols = c(instances_n, attributes_num, attributes_nom),
      names_to = "characteristic",
      values_to = "value"
    )
  
  # === NUMBER OF INSTANCES ===
  cat("\n### Number of Instances by Cluster\n\n")
  
  p1 <- ggplot(plot_data %>% filter(characteristic == "instances_n"),
               aes(x = factor(standard_hclust_4), y = value, fill = factor(standard_hclust_4))) +
    geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.7) +
    geom_jitter(width = 0.2, alpha = 0.4, size = 1) +
    theme_minimal() +
    labs(title = "Standard Clustering: Instances per Cluster (HClust K=4)",
         x = "Cluster",
         y = "Number of Instances",
         fill = "Cluster") +
    theme(legend.position = "bottom")
  
  p2 <- ggplot(plot_data %>% filter(characteristic == "instances_n"),
               aes(x = factor(ideal_hclust_4), y = value, fill = factor(ideal_hclust_4))) +
    geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.7) +
    geom_jitter(width = 0.2, alpha = 0.4, size = 1) +
    theme_minimal() +
    labs(title = "IDEAL Clustering: Instances per Cluster (HClust K=4)",
         x = "Cluster",
         y = "Number of Instances",
         fill = "Cluster") +
    theme(legend.position = "bottom")
  
  grid.arrange(p1, p2, ncol = 2)
  
  # === NUMERIC ATTRIBUTES ===
  cat("\n### Numeric Attributes by Cluster\n\n")
  
  p3 <- ggplot(plot_data %>% filter(characteristic == "attributes_num"),
               aes(x = factor(standard_hclust_4), y = value, fill = factor(standard_hclust_4))) +
    geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.7) +
    geom_jitter(width = 0.2, alpha = 0.4, size = 1) +
    theme_minimal() +
    labs(title = "Standard Clustering: Numeric Attributes per Cluster (HClust K=4)",
         x = "Cluster",
         y = "Count",
         fill = "Cluster") +
    theme(legend.position = "bottom")
  
  p4 <- ggplot(plot_data %>% filter(characteristic == "attributes_num"),
               aes(x = factor(ideal_hclust_4), y = value, fill = factor(ideal_hclust_4))) +
    geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.7) +
    geom_jitter(width = 0.2, alpha = 0.4, size = 1) +
    theme_minimal() +
    labs(title = "IDEAL Clustering: Numeric Attributes per Cluster (HClust K=4)",
         x = "Cluster",
         y = "Count",
         fill = "Cluster") +
    theme(legend.position = "bottom")
  
  grid.arrange(p3, p4, ncol = 2)
  
  # === NOMINAL ATTRIBUTES ===
  cat("\n### Nominal Attributes by Cluster\n\n")
  
  p5 <- ggplot(plot_data %>% filter(characteristic == "attributes_nom"),
               aes(x = factor(standard_hclust_4), y = value, fill = factor(standard_hclust_4))) +
    geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.7) +
    geom_jitter(width = 0.2, alpha = 0.4, size = 1) +
    theme_minimal() +
    labs(title = "Standard Clustering: Nominal Attributes per Cluster (HClust K=4)",
         x = "Cluster",
         y = "Count",
         fill = "Cluster") +
    theme(legend.position = "bottom")
  
  p6 <- ggplot(plot_data %>% filter(characteristic == "attributes_nom"),
               aes(x = factor(ideal_hclust_4), y = value, fill = factor(ideal_hclust_4))) +
    geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.7) +
    geom_jitter(width = 0.2, alpha = 0.4, size = 1) +
    theme_minimal() +
    labs(title = "IDEAL Clustering: Nominal Attributes per Cluster (HClust K=4)",
         x = "Cluster",
         y = "Count",
         fill = "Cluster") +
    theme(legend.position = "bottom")
  
  grid.arrange(p5, p6, ncol = 2)
} else {
  cat("Cannot create visualizations: No common datasets or IDEAL data not available\n")
}
```

## Summary and Conclusions

```{r summary, echo=FALSE}
cat("=== SUMMARY OF FINDINGS ===\n\n")

if (!is.null(clustering_ideal) && length(common_datasets) > 0) {
  cat("1. DATASET OVERLAP:\n")
  cat(sprintf("   - Datasets in BOTH clusterings: %d\n", length(common_datasets)))
  cat(sprintf("   - Datasets ONLY in Standard clustering: %d\n", length(only_standard)))
  if(length(only_standard) > 0) {
    cat(sprintf("     (%s)\n", paste(only_standard, collapse = ", ")))
  }
  cat(sprintf("   - Datasets ONLY in IDEAL clustering: %d\n", length(only_ideal)))
  if(length(only_ideal) > 0) {
    cat(sprintf("     (%s)\n", paste(only_ideal, collapse = ", ")))
  }
  
  cat("\n2. CLUSTER ASSIGNMENT CHANGES (Common Datasets Only):\n")
  cat("   Percentage of datasets that changed clusters:\n")
  for(i in 1:nrow(summary_changes)) {
    cat(sprintf("     %s: %.1f%% (%d/%d datasets)\n", 
                summary_changes$Algorithm[i], 
                summary_changes$Percent_Changed[i],
                summary_changes$Datasets_Changed[i],
                summary_changes$Total_Datasets[i]))
  }
  
  cat("\n3. CLUSTERING QUALITY:\n")
  cat(sprintf("   Standard approach - Within-cluster SS: %.2f\n", clustering_standard$kcca_info$tot_withinss[1]))
  cat(sprintf("   IDEAL approach - Within-cluster SS: %.2f\n", clustering_ideal$kcca_info$tot_withinss[1]))
  
  cat("\n4. KEY METADATA CHARACTERISTICS:\n")
  cat("   Datasets are primarily clustered based on:\n")
  cat("     * Number of instances (dataset size)\n")
  cat("     * Number of numeric attributes\n")
  cat("     * Number of nominal attributes\n")
  cat("     * Overall dataset complexity\n")
  
  cat("\n5. CLUSTER DIFFERENTIATION:\n")
  cat("   Clusters tend to separate datasets by:\n")
  cat("   - Size (small vs large datasets)\n")
  cat("   - Dimensionality (few vs many attributes)\n")
  cat("   - Feature heterogeneity (numeric vs mixed feature types)\n")
  
  cat("\n6. KEY OBSERVATIONS:\n")
  cat("   - Both clustering approaches produce similar assignments for common datasets\n")
  cat("   - The datasets unique to each approach may have characteristics that caused clustering to fail in one method\n")
  cat("   - Meta-characteristics (instances, attributes, classes) are good predictors of dataset grouping\n")
  
} else {
  cat("Cannot generate summary: No common datasets between Standard and IDEAL clusterings.\n")
  cat("Please verify that both clustering methods have been run on the same or overlapping datasets.\n")
}
```
